list.name: Changes
list.comment: rearrange the full project structure for better organization

task.summary: The basic signal generation by SIL and HIL by dSPACE.
The ConfigurationDesk files for Configuration of pin and model for Analog Signal Generation by SIL and HIL methods by dSPACE hardware.
Add ControlDesk files for Analog Signal Generation using SIL and HIL with dSPACE hardware.
Add MATLAB model files for Analog Signal Generation,Designed for dSPACE hardware integration.
The ConfigurationDesk files are for the pin configuration and model for digital signal generation by SIL and HIL methods by dSPACE hardware.
Add ControlDesk files for Digital Signal Generation using SIL and HIL with dSPACE hardware
Add MATLAB model files for Digital Signal Generation with dSPACE hardware integration
elete old project files from the master branch

Add ConfigurationDesk files for pin configuration and Arduino Mega communication
- Implemented ConfigurationDesk files for configuring pins and signal transmission - Enables communication with Arduino Mega - Arduino Mega controls all connected sensors, motors, and actuators

Add ControlDesk files for SIL and HIL simulation and testing
- Implemented ControlDesk files for testing SIL (loopback method) - Integrated HIL testing with Arduino Mega using SCALEXIO processor - Included all necessary testing layouts

The MATLAB models for Vehicle Behavioral Model with dSPACE integration
- Designed and validated SIL and HIL models for vehicle behavioral control and testing - Implemented signal-based testing with Arduino Mega - Covered functionalities including steering, accelerator, brake, handbrake, indicators, and start button

Add MATLAB model for Arduino Mega integration with dSPACE SCALEXIO
- Developed MATLAB model to control sensors and motors based on signals from dSPACE SCALEXIO - Ensures real-time communication and control

Add ConfigurationDesk files for real vehicle motor control via BUS manager
- Implemented real-time vehicle control system with BUS management - Enabled direct control of PVC motors and steering in a physical vehicle - Conducted ECU-based HIL testing for real vehicle control using CAN-based communication with PVC motor

The ControlDesk files for motor control via ECU messaging with BUS management
- Enabled direct control of PVC motors and steering in a physical vehicle - Implemented ControlDesk files for controlling motors by sending messages to ECU - Enabled motor and steering control through BUS manipulation, BUS simulation, and BUS inspection - Integrated ECU-based vehicle control system with real-time testing capabilities - Conducted ECU-based HIL testing using CAN-based communication with PVC motor

The MATLAB model for CAN message management with constant blocks
- Developed MATLAB model for managing CAN messages - Integrated constant blocks for signal substitution and processing - Ensured seamless communication and data handling within the CAN network - Supports real-time ECU-based testing and validation
rearrange the full project structure for better organization
rearrange the full project structure for better organization

MESSAGE.value: The basic signal generation by SIL and HIL by dSPACE.
The ConfigurationDesk files for Configuration of pin and model for Analog Signal Generation by SIL and HIL methods by dSPACE hardware.

The ConfigurationDesk files are for the pin configuration and model for digital signal generation by SIL and HIL methods by dSPACE hardware.
Add ControlDesk files for Digital Signal Generation using SIL and HIL with dSPACE hardware
Add MATLAB model files for Digital Signal Generation with dSPACE hardware integration
Delete old project files from the master branch
Delete old project files from the master branch

Add ConfigurationDesk files for pin configuration and Arduino Mega communication
- Implemented ConfigurationDesk files for configuring pins and signal transmission - Enables communication with Arduino Mega - Arduino Mega controls all connected sensors, motors, and actuators

Add ControlDesk files for SIL and HIL simulation and testing
- Implemented ControlDesk files for testing SIL (loopback method) - Integrated HIL testing with Arduino Mega using SCALEXIO processor - Included all necessary testing layouts

The MATLAB models for Vehicle Behavioral Model with dSPACE integration
- Designed and validated SIL and HIL models for vehicle behavioral control and testing - Implemented signal-based testing with Arduino Mega - Covered functionalities including steering, accelerator, brake, handbrake, indicators, and start button

Add MATLAB model for Arduino Mega integration with dSPACE SCALEXIO
- Developed MATLAB model to control sensors and motors based on signals from dSPACE SCALEXIO - Ensures real-time communication and control

Add ConfigurationDesk files for real vehicle motor control via BUS manager
- Implemented real-time vehicle control system with BUS management - Enabled direct control of PVC motors and steering in a physical vehicle - Conducted ECU-based HIL testing for real vehicle control using CAN-based communication with PVC motor

The ControlDesk files for motor control via ECU messaging with BUS management
- Enabled direct control of PVC motors and steering in a physical vehicle - Implemented ControlDesk files for controlling motors by sending messages to ECU - Enabled motor and steering control through BUS manipulation, BUS simulation, and BUS inspection - Integrated ECU-based vehicle control system with real-time testing capabilities - Conducted ECU-based HIL testing using CAN-based communication with PVC motor

The MATLAB model for CAN message management with constant blocks
- Developed MATLAB model for managing CAN messages - Integrated constant blocks for signal substitution and processing - Ensured seamless communication and data handling within the CAN network - Supports real-time ECU-based testing and validation
rearrange the full project structure for better organization

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: rearrange the full project structure for better organization
